EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A connection from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} is established on host {event_src.host}
A connection from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} is rejected by host {event_src.host}
A connection from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} is dropped by host {event_src.host}
A connection from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} is allowed by host {event_src.host}
